_A_DATEPICKER_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION_: Allows interactive selection of a date and, depending on the configuration, also time. The component supports different display modes such as date, time, or datetime and offers additional options for limiting the selectable range and controlling the initial calendar focus.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_APPEND_TO_BODY_DESCRI: Determines whether the calendar popover is rendered directly inside the document body.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_CLASS_DESCRIPTION_: CSS class or class object applied to the outer datepicker container.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_CLEARABLE_DESCRIPTION: Displays a clear icon that removes the current value from the field.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_CONFIRM_DESCRIPTION_: Requires explicit confirmation before the selected value is emitted.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_CONFIRM_TEXT_DESCRIPT: Label of the confirm button shown inside the calendar panel.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_DATE_FORMAT_DESCRIPTI: Format used for the date tooltip and time header inside the panel.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_EDITABLE_DESCRIPTION_: Allows typing directly into the input field. If disabled, the value can only be changed via the panel.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_FIRST_DAY_OF_WEEK_DES: Sets which day is shown as the first day of the week in the calendar. Allowed values are 1 to 7.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_FOCUS_START_DATE_DESC: If set, the initial calendar focus is moved to start-date when the panel opens.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_FORMAT_DESCRIPTION_: Display format used in the input field and for parsing manually entered values.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_FORMAT_SAVE_DESCRIPTI: Format used when saving or emitting the component value.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_ICON_DAY_DESCRIPTION_: Custom icon displayed inside the input field.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_INPUT_ATTR_DESCRIPTIO: Attributes applied directly to the internal input element of the datepicker.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_INPUT_NAME_DESCRIPTIO: Name attribute of the internal input element.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_MINUTE_STEP_DESCRIPTI: Step used for minutes in the time panel. Allowed values are between 0 and 60.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_PLACEMENT_DESCRIPTION: Placement of the calendar popover relative to the input field.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_PLACEHOLDERS_DEFAULT_: Defines default placeholder values for different datepicker scenarios when the regular placeholder prop is not provided. Supported keys include date, dateRange, timeHour, timeMinute, timeSecond, datetimeHour, datetimeMinute, and datetimeSecond.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_POPUP_STYLE_DESCRIPTI: Inline styles applied to the popup calendar container.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_RANGE_SEPARATOR_DESCR: Separator string used between start and end values in range mode.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_SHORTCUTS_DESCRIPTION: Shows shortcut presets in the calendar panel. Can be a boolean or a custom shortcuts array.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_START_DATE_DESCRIPTIO: Initial date used for the first visible calendar view.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_TIME_PRECISION_DESCRI: Controls which time units are shown in the time panel. Supported values are hour, minute, and second.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_TYPE_DESCRIPTION_: Defines the datepicker mode. Supported values are date, datetime, month, year, and time.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_VALUE_TYPE_DESCRIPTIO: Defines the format of the emitted model value. Supported values are timestamp, format, date, or a custom object.
_A_DATEPICKER_PROP_WIDTH_DESCRIPTION_: Width of the datepicker input. Accepts a number in pixels or any valid CSS width value.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_START_DATE_DESCRIPTION_: Use the start-date and focus-start-date props to control the initial focus of the calendar.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_START_DATE_NEXT_YEA: start-date is set to next year, model is not set
start-date is set to next year, model is set
start-date is set to next year, model is set and focus-start-date = true
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_MAX_MIN_DATE_DESCRIPTIO: Use the max-date and min-date props to limit the selectable date range.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_WITH_MIN_DATE_: Select a date not earlier than the minimum
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_WITH_MAX_DATE_: Select a date not later than the maximum
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_WITH_MIN_AND_MAX_DA: Select a date between the minimum and maximum
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_PLACEHOLDER_DEFAULT_DES: When placeholder is not passed, the component now chooses a default placeholder based on type and time-precision. You can override these defaults with placeholders-default.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_PLACEHOLDER_DEFAULT: Default placeholder for time with hours only
Default placeholder for time with hours and minutes
Default placeholder for datetime with seconds
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_PLACEHOLDER_CUSTOM_DATE: Pick date and time up to minutes
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_TYPE_DESCRIPTION_: Use the type prop to switch between date, time, and datetime selection modes.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_TIME_PRECISION_DESCRIPT: Use the time-precision prop to choose whether the time panel shows only hours, hours with minutes, or hours with minutes and seconds. The example below shows this for both datetime and time.
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_TIME_PRECISION_DATE: Datetime with hours, minutes, and seconds
_PAGE_DATEPICKER_LBL_TIME_PRECISION_TIME: Time with hours, minutes, and seconds
